description: Personal ground-truth dossier about the user (Logan Moray), indexed in Moss. The Truth Mic retrieves the relevant fact(s) for whatever is spoken and flags contradictions. Structured identity facts carry metadata.field/value/aliases for the instant path; the rest are atomic text facts for semantic retrieval + LLM judgment. Compiled June 7, 2026.

facts.text: His name is Logan Moray. He goes by Logan.
Logan was born on December 2, 2004.
Logan is 21 years old (born December 2, 2004; as of June 2026).
Logan was born in California, USA.
Logan is a US citizen by birth. His mother is Dutch-born, and he has explored Dutch/EU citizenship.
Logan is based between California and Southeast Asia, often Bali.
Logan graduated from Nordhoff High School in June 2023, with academic letters in Math and English.
Logan attends Cal Poly Pomona as a sophomore studying Business Marketing.
Logan's major is Business Marketing.
Logan co-founded TrendSweep, a short-form / social-video intelligence startup, with Orfeas.
Logan's TrendSweep co-founder is Orfeas, who later left for another startup in LA.
Logan's personal website is loganmoray.com.
Logan's email address is loganbmoray@gmail.com.
Logan speaks English natively, elementary Dutch, and is learning Spanish and Mandarin.
Logan holds a PADI open-water scuba certification.
Logan owns a Sony a6700 camera.
Logan owns a DJI Mavic 4 Pro drone.
Logan spent about 3.5 years living in the Netherlands during high school and returned to California in 2020.
Logan built Clarity, a shipped AI app for communication analysis, manipulation detection, and conflict analysis, with paying users on the App Store.
TrendSweep's product directions are Atlas (semantic short-form social-video search API for AI agents) and Iris (trend identification and clustering).
TrendSweep raised investment around January 2026 and has pivoted multiple times; runway is roughly a couple of months.
Logan's earliest venture was Expon (Expon.org): e-commerce/dropshipping that evolved into AI automation and consulting.
In summer 2025 Logan was a remote Business Strategy & Research Intern at Innventure.
Logan was a Regional Property Manager at LuxeVaca, overseeing 20+ luxury properties across Monterey, Carmel, and Santa Cruz.
Logan did project management at Janelle Interiors, including a year-long six-figure Ojai Valley Inn engagement.
Logan's early high-school jobs were at Ojai Cafe Emporium, Harvest Moon Ojai, and Vons.
Logan has run his own ventures since age 16.
Logan is a founder and entrepreneur and a Business Marketing student; he is non-technical but builds with AI tools.
Logan wants to break into venture capital, starting as a scout and eventually angel investing; he networks at SF startup events.
At 17, Logan reverse-engineered the badge system to get into the invite-only MARS conference and met Jeff Bezos.
Logan goes to the gym about 6 days a week, focused on building muscle and strength.
Logan freedives, scuba dives, and spearfishes, and cares about marine conservation and coral-reef restoration.
Logan enjoys surfing, skydiving, and wingsuiting.
Logan plays Texas Hold'em and Ultimate Texas Hold'em and follows Bay Area poker.
Logan builds photorealistic AI character pipelines in ComfyUI using SDXL, Flux LoRAs, IP-Adapter, and ControlNet.
Logan runs a hyperrealistic AI video series called Yarnak the Yeti, a sarcastic yeti vlogging about wilderness life.
Logan wants a location-independent lifestyle, running a meaningful business with the freedom to travel, and to own or rent properties worldwide.
Logan's skills span sales, marketing, operations, business strategy, project management, AI automation, CRM integrations, and GTM positioning.
